articles.title: She’s running the Boston Marathon for her former patient with Morquio syndrome
articles.description:
"I always told Gio he could do hard things, so now I do hard things for him," Donnelly said.

The post She’s running the Boston Marathon for her former patient with Morquio syndrome appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Erin Donnelly is running the Boston Marathon to support her former patient, Gio.
Gio has Morquio syndrome, a rare genetic disorder affecting his mobility.
Donnelly's run raises awareness for rare diseases among Boston residents.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown scores 18 of his 41 points in the fourth quarter to help Celtics beat Suns 120-112
articles.description:
Boston scored 12 of the game’s last 13 points to pull away.

The post Jaylen Brown scores 18 of his 41 points in the fourth quarter to help Celtics beat Suns 120-112 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics secured a 120-112 victory over the Suns on March 16.
Jaylen Brown scored 41 points, including 18 in the fourth quarter.
Boston's win boosts playoff positioning as the season progresses.

articles.title: Bruins fall to Devils 4-3 in OT as US Olympic hero Jack Hughes has 3 assists
articles.description:
The Bruins are clinging to the second and final wild-card spot in the Eastern Conference after getting passed by Detroit when the Red Wings beat Calgary on Monday night.

The post Bruins fall to Devils 4-3 in OT as US Olympic hero Jack Hughes has 3 assists appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins lost to Devils 4-3 in overtime on March 16, 2026.
Jack Hughes recorded three assists, showcasing his Olympic-level talent.
Bruins now risk losing their wild-card spot after Detroit's victory over Calgary.

articles.title: Tyngsborough man charged with murder after human remains found buried under garage floor, police say
articles.description:
The remains have not been identified, but police believe they belong to a Lowell woman missing for more than a year.

The post Tyngsborough man charged with murder after human remains found buried under garage floor, police say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tyngsborough man charged with murder after human remains discovered under garage floor.
Remains likely belong to a Lowell woman missing for over a year.
Investigation raises concerns about safety and unresolved cases in the Greater Boston area.
